board_csa_architect.notes: Additive schema changes only. Indexed grace period lookup maintains auth middleware performance. Pattern aligns with refresh_token rotation (REQ-SEC-05). North Star aligned.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: SHA-256 hashing eliminates plaintext key storage. Grace period bounded (default 24h). Raw key shown once. Existing RLS maintained. Audit log captures rotation events for SOC 2 CC6.3 compliance.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Zero AI/VRAM impact. Pure infrastructure change. Shared service layer eliminates code duplication between CLI and API. TypeScript strict compatible.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Grace period prevents 3AM breakage. Additive migration is zero-downtime. CLI backward compatible. last_used_at provides key usage observability for ops monitoring.

board_red_team.notes: APPROVE with conditions: 1) Max grace period cap (168h) must be enforced at validation layer. 2) Row-level locking (SELECT FOR UPDATE) required to prevent concurrent rotation race conditions. 3) Constant-time hash comparison required. STRIDE: all 6 categories mitigated in design. 3 failure scenarios documented.
